scene_input.scene_summary: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs returns from his successful mission, meeting the Prophet's eyes.

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs returns from his successful mission, meeting the Prophet's eyes and sharing the good news.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Interior of the Mosque in Medina, with a simple stone floor and plain wooden pillars supporting a flat roof. Late afternoon sunlight streams through a pair of narrow windows high up on the wall, casting soft rays across the room. In the center of the room, the central figure in the green cloak sits on a low wooden stool, facing the doorway. On his right, a tall figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, wearing a simple white thobe with a brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering, carrying a staff in one hand, smiling and looking up at the central figure with a joyful expression. Soft warm golden light, intimate and sacred mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the central figure' (no change needed)
'seen entirely from behind' -> 'seen from behind' (no change needed)
